_note: I-2 baseline fixture — cmp-003. Clean strong output — hits all expected dimensions, no unsupported claims. G-2 overall = 1.0. G-2 pass_fail = True. Safety: ESCALATE (escalation_required=true).
summary: The advisory describes critical quality system weaknesses in industrial control systems that could allow unauthorized access.
recommendations: Initiate a CAPA to address the identified control system vulnerabilities.
Apply all available patches and update firmware to the latest version.

citations.excerpt: Affected versions of the software contain a critical buffer overflow vulnerability.

escalation_reason: Critical ICS vulnerability requires immediate escalation.
